calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
James K. O'Galagher, Esq. for Petitioner: Ana Rosa Peterson, present as Guardian at litem for: Steven Matthew Peterson, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $40,00.00 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $9,559.07
Fees & Costs $1,761.30
A net balance of $28,679.63 to be depositted into a blocked account with Bank of America, Noe Valley Branch, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order for Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
